data.name: TakeSuccess
data.value: Report taken. Start cleanup when ready.

data.name: StartMissingBeforePhoto
data.value: Attach at least one before-cleanup photo.

data.name: StartSuccess
data.value: Cleanup started. Upload after-photos when finished.

data.name: CompleteMissingAfterPhoto
data.value: Attach at least one after-cleanup photo.

data.name: CompleteSuccess
data.value: Cleanup completed. The inspector will verify your work.

data.name: RouteTooFewReports
data.value: Select at least 2 reports to build a route.

data.name: FlagMissingPhoto
data.value: Attach at least one evidence photo.

data.name: FlagSuccess
data.value: Report flagged. An inspector will review your evidence.
